positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a lone celestial fox spirit (kitsune), depicted in elegant profile silhouette against a deep, cosmic midnight blue and indigo gradient background. The fox is stylized with sharp, flowing tails and expressive ears, surrounded by subtle, glowing constellations and wisps of stardust. The overall aesthetic should be neo-traditional tattoo style meets clean vector illustration, using limited spot colors (gold leaf accents, ethereal lavender, deep teal). High contrast, excellent depth of field, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, negative space utilized effectively. Studio lighting.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, border, blur, grain, noise, artifact, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, deformed, low quality, cartoon, realistic photograph, sketch
